name: Eggplant Parmigiana (October 1992)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice eggplants lengthwise. Place in a colander in layers with salt between each layer. Let stand for 1 hour to remove bitterness.
2. Wash the eggplant well to get the salt out and dry thoroughly in paper towels.
3. Heat plenty of the oil mixture and cook the eggplants in batches, drying in paper towels afterward.
4. Place one layer of eggplant in a baking dish.
5. Top with tomato sauce and sprinkle parmesan. Add a layer of mozzarella, then start again with another layer of eggplant.
6. Keep alternating layers in the same manner.
7. Top layer should be eggplant. Sprinkle the remaining parmesan on top.
8. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 20 minutes. Check and drain excess oil if needed.
9. Bake an additional 15 minutes.
10. Serve hot.
